# IPTC Creator Contact Info Dictionary Keys

**API Collection**

Keys for an image that uses International Press Telecommunications Council (IPTC) metadata.

## Overview

IPTC constants are metadata elements of the Information Interchange Model (IIM) used to provide information about images. The IIM was developed by the Newspaper Association of America (NAA) and the IPTC.

These keys reference data stored in the dictionary attached to the [doc://com.apple.imageio/documentation/ImageIO/kCGImagePropertyIPTCCreatorContactInfo] key.

- **kCGImagePropertyIPTCContactInfoCity**: The city portion of the contact information.
- **kCGImagePropertyIPTCContactInfoCountry**: The country or region portion of the contact information.
- **kCGImagePropertyIPTCContactInfoAddress**: The address portion of the contact information.
- **kCGImagePropertyIPTCContactInfoPostalCode**: The postal code portion of the contact.
- **kCGImagePropertyIPTCContactInfoStateProvince**: The state or province of the contact.
- **kCGImagePropertyIPTCContactInfoEmails**: Email addresses for the contact.
- **kCGImagePropertyIPTCContactInfoPhones**: Phone numbers for the contact.
- **kCGImagePropertyIPTCContactInfoWebURLs**: Web addresses for the contact.

## Personnel

- **kCGImagePropertyIPTCByline**: The name of the person who created the image.
- **kCGImagePropertyIPTCBylineTitle**: The title of the person who created the image.
- **kCGImagePropertyIPTCSource**: The original owner of the image.
- **kCGImagePropertyIPTCContact**: The contact information for getting details about the image.
- **kCGImagePropertyIPTCWriterEditor**: The name of the person who wrote or edited the description of the image.
- **kCGImagePropertyIPTCCreatorContactInfo**: The creator’s contact info.
